title: Fork in the Code
relevance_summary: Access control changes via KYC checks before transaction execution

prevention.rule: Block any tx that fails an access control check before executing a financial function

red_flags: require statement checking for approved address
vulnerable_contracts: any contract implementing access control via approved mapping
monitoring_rules: Block txs where ACCESS_CONTROL_FAILED -> financial_function() in single tx
summary: The US Treasury proposed to implement KYC checks via digital identity credentials before executing DeFi transactions. Contracts with access control checks could be exploited if the user fails the KYC check.
